prompt: Create a small sprite sheet of three separate glowing firefly particles for a website effect, arranged horizontally with generous spacing, each particle is a simple cyan-green/gold magical glow dot with tiny wings or spark shape. Perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. No text, no shadow, no floor, no gradient.
style: clean web FX sprite asset, crisp silhouette, soft glow contained around each firefly
composition: square image, three small particles centered in separate areas with large padding, no overlap
lighting: self-illuminated soft cyan-green and warm gold glow only
palette: firefly cyan green, pale gold, white core, no magenta inside subject
materials: glow sprite, tiny translucent wings suggested, no realistic insect detail
constraints: background must be one uniform #ff00ff with no texture, shadows, reflections, or lighting variation; do not use #ff00ff in the subject; no watermark
negative: natural scene background, gradients, floor plane, text, watermark, large insect body, realistic macro photo

prompt: Create one larger guiding firefly illustration for a website 404 hint card and hidden portal cue, elegant cyan-green glow with small golden core and delicate wings, centered with generous padding. Perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. No text, no shadow, no floor, no gradient.
style: polished web FX cutout asset, magical but restrained, crisp edges with soft glow
composition: single centered subject, full glow visible, large padding on all sides
lighting: self-illuminated firefly glow, no cast shadow
palette: firefly cyan green, pale gold, moon white core, no magenta inside subject
materials: soft light, delicate wing silhouette, subtle particle halo
constraints: background must be one uniform #ff00ff with no shadows, no gradients, no texture; do not use #ff00ff in subject; no watermark
negative: forest background, text, logo, hard black outline, realistic insect closeup, smoke, reflections

prompt: Generic professional avatar placeholder for an AI infrastructure engineer portfolio, East Asian male adult, modern clean portrait, black shirt, calm neutral expression, subtle dark ink-green studio background with faint tree-ring halo, realistic but lightly illustrated, not a specific real person. No text, no logo.
style: polished professional portrait illustration for resume sidebar, restrained and modern, not fantasy character art
composition: square head-and-shoulders portrait, centered, clean circular-crop friendly framing, neutral gaze
lighting: soft frontal studio light with subtle moonlit rim, no harsh shadows
palette: dark ink green, moon white skin highlights, black clothing, muted gold-green halo accents
materials: fabric shirt, subtle paper-grain background, faint tree-ring glow
constraints: do not imply exact likeness to a real person; no name; no text; no watermark; avoid costumes and fantasy props
negative: armor, robes, sword, exaggerated fantasy, anime, cartoon, over-glamour, text, logo, distorted face
